title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.390 - Division of townships into road districts
text:
65.390.  Division of townships into road districts. — The township board of directors shall have power to divide their townships into convenient road districts, and may, at their April meeting, change the same in such manner as the interest of the township may demand.
(RSMo 1939 § 13984) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12307; 1919 § 13220; 1909 § 11708
